title: Performance Eternal
description: Essential modpack for boosting fabric performance.
body:
🔥 **Performance Eternal**

Performance Eternal is a sleek, performance-first modpack for Minecraft 1.21.5, built for players who want smoother gameplay without straying far from vanilla. Whether you're on a potato pc or just want maximum frames, this pack delivers optimized performance with zero fluff.

🐜 Report bugs or broken versions by joining the linked discord server and creating a ticket.

✨ Features:

🚀 High FPS Boost – Powered by industry-standard mods and finely tuned tweaks.

🧠 Smart Optimizations – Reduces lag, improves chunk loading, and boosts rendering efficiency.

⌚ Fast Updates - 
This modpack updates to new versions pretty quick!

🛠️ Fabric-based – Fast, modular, and fully open-source compatible.

📦 Included Mods:

- Fabric API
 
- Sodium
  
- Bad Optimization
  
- Concurrent Chunk Management Engine
  
- Cloth Config API
  
- Dynamic FPS
  
- Entity Culling
  
- FerriteCore
  
- ImmediatelyFast
  
- Lithium
 
- Mod Menu
  
- More Culling
  
- Very Many Players

🔧 Details:

Modloader: Fabric

Whether you're mining, building, or PvPing, Performance Eternal keeps your world running smooth — eternally.

Click [here](https://mrpacktozip.pages.dev/) for a online tool that lets you convert mrpacks into a zip with mods inside.

Join the [discord server](https://discord.gg/BMhUMXPYKY) for suggestions like adding support for servers and new versions.
 
Donate on [Ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/darkflareplays8) and help me continue maintaining and updating this modpack? 
You'll also get a special discord donator's role if you are in the server! The currency has been **temporarily** changed to pounds.

Next person to say a new version set in the discord server general gets a role! (for example 1.21.x) is a set but say one i haven't added!

**FYI: This Performance Pack is unlikely to help with Shaders!**
